spec.name: A Dusty Tunnel
spec.description: You are standing in dust. This place has not been touched for a long time. Otherwise it is quite boring here, looks like a place to rest! To the west you see the outline of a door. A tunnel leads to the east.

east.description: You see a tunnel which leads downwards. It is quite dark.

west.description: You can see the outline of a door. Just like in the description!
